metrics.cer: character error rate, lower is better
metrics.wer: word error rate, lower is better
metrics.field_level_recall: share of expected answer-key field values found in OCR text
metrics.pii_recall: share of expected PII values found in OCR text
metrics.critical_pii_false_negative_count: critical PII values missing from OCR output
metrics.redaction_box_mapping_success: expected PII boxes matched by OCR word boxes at IoU threshold
metrics.low_confidence_review_trigger_accuracy: whether low confidence would send risky rows to review
